# Quickstart: Local Development Stack

*Generated by `/speckit-plan` for Unit 0 — Project Scaffolding.*

---

## Prerequisites

| Requirement | Minimum version | Notes |
|-------------|----------------|-------|
| Docker Desktop | 4.x | The only required tool on the host machine |
| Docker Compose | v2 (bundled with Docker Desktop) | Invoked as `docker compose` (not `docker-compose`) |
| Git | Any recent version | For cloning the repository |

No Node.js, pnpm, or any language runtime is required on the host machine. Everything runs inside Docker containers.

---

## First-time Setup

```bash
# Clone the repository
git clone <repo-url>
cd whos-next

# Make the dev script executable (once only)
chmod +x dev.sh

# Build images and start the stack
./dev.sh fresh
```

`fresh` builds all images in parallel via `docker buildx bake`, then starts the stack. This also creates `.env` from `.env.example` automatically on the first run.

The stack is ready when you see all three services healthy in the output (typically under 5 minutes).

| Service | URL | Notes |
|---------|-----|-------|
| Frontend | http://localhost:4200 | Angular dev server with hot reload |
| Backend | http://localhost:3000 | NestJS dev server with hot reload |
| PostgreSQL | localhost:5432 | Direct DB access (user: postgres, pass: postgres) |

**Frontend proxies `/api/*` to the backend** — no CORS configuration required.

---

## Daily Workflow

```bash
./dev.sh up              # start the stack (foreground; Ctrl+C to stop)
./dev.sh up -d           # start detached (background)
./dev.sh down            # stop the stack (volumes preserved)
./dev.sh logs            # follow all logs
./dev.sh logs backend    # follow one service
./dev.sh status          # show container status
```

---

## After Adding or Removing Packages

**This is the only step needed** when `package.json` changes:

```bash
./dev.sh fresh
```

`fresh` removes all named volumes (including the protected node_modules volumes), rebuilds images so `pnpm install` runs again with the updated manifests, then restarts the stack.

---

## Verify the Stack is Healthy

```bash
# Backend health check (expects: {"status":"ok","database":"connected"})
curl http://localhost:3000/health

# Open the frontend in a browser
open http://localhost:4200    # macOS
xdg-open http://localhost:4200 # Linux
start http://localhost:4200    # Windows (Git Bash)
```

---

## Run Tests

```bash
./dev.sh test              # all suites (frontend unit + backend unit + e2e)
./dev.sh test frontend     # Vitest — frontend unit tests
./dev.sh test backend      # Vitest — backend unit tests
./dev.sh test e2e          # Playwright + axe-core accessibility tests
```

The e2e suite requires the full stack to be running (`./dev.sh up -d` first).

---

## Database Management

```bash
./dev.sh migrate           # run pending MikroORM migrations
./dev.sh psql              # open psql session against the running database
./dev.sh down -v           # stop and remove all volumes (resets database)
```

The PostgreSQL data volume persists between `./dev.sh up` / `./dev.sh down` cycles. Use `./dev.sh fresh` to reset everything (database + node_modules).

---

## Language Switching

The frontend shell ships with Dutch and English from day one. The language toggle in the placeholder home page switches all visible text without a page reload.

- Default language: English
- Available languages: English (`en`), Dutch (`nl`)
- Translation files: `frontend/src/assets/i18n/en.json` and `nl.json`

---

## Utilities

```bash
./dev.sh shell             # shell into the backend container
./dev.sh shell frontend    # shell into the frontend container
./dev.sh build             # rebuild images only (no restart)
./dev.sh build --no-cache  # force a clean rebuild (ignores layer cache)
./dev.sh build frontend    # rebuild only the frontend image
./dev.sh prune             # remove stopped containers and dangling images/volumes
./dev.sh help              # show all commands
```

---

## Troubleshooting

| Problem | Cause | Fix |
|---------|-------|-----|
| `./dev.sh` permission denied | Script not executable | `chmod +x dev.sh` |
| `./dev.sh fresh` hangs | Docker Desktop not running | Start Docker Desktop first |
| Port conflict on 5432 / 4200 / 3000 | Another process owns the port | Stop the conflicting process, or override the port in `.env` |
| Stale database from previous session | Volume persists between runs | `./dev.sh fresh` or `./dev.sh down -v && ./dev.sh up` |
| Frontend not reloading on file save | Polling not propagating | Ensure Docker Desktop file sharing is enabled for the repo directory |
| `curl /health` returns 503 | Backend cannot reach DB | `./dev.sh logs backend` and `./dev.sh logs postgres` |
| New package not found in container | node_modules volume is stale | `./dev.sh fresh` — this is the correct workflow |
